notes: This fixture snapshots D19 marker-generation anchors from the frozen source-side shell/AWK/C generator path.
Dynamic generator anchors are represented by their source printf format and expanded by Oracle tests into concrete D19 manifest literals.
Oracle tests compare manifest literals to this checked-in fixture and do not read source-side scripts/launchd as live authority.
Ordering remains owned by Phase08.LaunchctlVerifierCommon in this migration chunk.
